mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(GR_YMD,'YYYY-MM') AS "ym", COUNT(*) AS "cnt", NVL(SUM(TOT_AMT),0) AS "amt" FROM GR_RECEIPT WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS='CFM' AND GR_YMD IS NOT NULL AND TO_CHAR(GR_YMD,'YYYY') = #{year} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(GR_YMD,'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY "ym"

SELECT VD_CD AS "vdCd", VD_NM AS "vdNm", COUNT(*) AS "cnt", NVL(SUM(TOT_AMT),0) AS "amt" FROM GR_RECEIPT WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS='CFM' AND (#{year} IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(GR_YMD,'YYYY') = #{year}) GROUP BY VD_CD, VD_NM ORDER BY "amt" DESC

SELECT I.ITEM_CD AS "itemCd", I.ITEM_NM AS "itemNm", NVL(SUM(I.GR_QTY),0) AS "qty", NVL(SUM(I.AMT),0) AS "amt" FROM GR_RECEIPT_ITEM I JOIN GR_RECEIPT R ON R.ID = I.RECEIPT_ID AND R.DEL_YN='N' AND R.STS='CFM' WHERE (#{year} IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(R.GR_YMD,'YYYY') = #{year}) GROUP BY I.ITEM_CD, I.ITEM_NM ORDER BY "amt" DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(PO_YMD,'YYYY-MM') AS "ym", COUNT(*) AS "cnt", NVL(SUM(TOT_AMT),0) AS "amt" FROM PO_ORDER WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS <> 'CANCEL' AND PO_YMD IS NOT NULL AND TO_CHAR(PO_YMD,'YYYY') = #{year} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(PO_YMD,'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY "ym"

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT H.VD_CD AS "vdCd", H.ITEM_CD AS "itemCd", C.CD_NM_KO AS "chgTyp", H.OLD_PRC AS "oldPrc", H.NEW_PRC AS "newPrc", H.NEW_SD AS "newSd", H.NEW_ED AS "newEd", TO_CHAR(H.REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "regDt" FROM IP_PRICE_HIS H LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='IP_CHG_TYP' AND C.CD=H.CHG_TYP AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE 1=1 AND H.VD_CD=#{vdCd} AND H.ITEM_CD=#{itemCd} ORDER BY H.ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 100

SELECT T.CD_NM_KO AS "adjTypNm", COUNT(*) AS "cnt", NVL(SUM(A.ADJ_AMT),0) AS "amt" FROM CL_CLOSE_ADJ A JOIN CL_CLOSE C ON C.ID = A.CLOSE_ID AND C.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='CL_ADJ_TYP' AND T.CD=A.ADJ_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' WHERE (#{closeYm} IS NULL OR C.CLOSE_YM = #{closeYm}) GROUP BY T.CD_NM_KO ORDER BY "amt"

SELECT (SELECT NVL(SUM(TOT_AMT),0) FROM GR_RECEIPT WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS='CFM' AND TO_CHAR(GR_YMD,'YYYY')=#{year}) AS "grAmt", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM GR_RECEIPT WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS='CFM' AND TO_CHAR(GR_YMD,'YYYY')=#{year}) AS "grCnt", (SELECT NVL(SUM(TOT_AMT),0) FROM PO_ORDER WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS<>'CANCEL' AND TO_CHAR(PO_YMD,'YYYY')=#{year}) AS "poAmt", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PO_ORDER WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS<>'CANCEL' AND TO_CHAR(PO_YMD,'YYYY')=#{year}) AS "poCnt" FROM DUAL
